03 About
“

I’ve assessed 80+ startup opportunities, spun out companies that raised $250M, and run operations at a fast-growth energy business in China. This isn’t advisory from the sidelines.

Anna Tao

Over eight years co-leading CSIRO’s company creation team, I helped turn research into investable ventures — building spinouts that collectively raised over $250M and created 180 local jobs within three years.

Before that, I was Operations Director at Cybercon Technology, scaling a patented data centre cooling solution across China.

Today I work with a focused number of founders and institutions as a Venture Builder at Beanstalk Venture Studio — APAC’s agtech venture studio. I also advise research teams on commercialisation strategy and serve as an active angel investor across deep tech and climate.

Career highlights

2024– Beanstalk Venture Studio Venture Builder — agtech scouting & commercialisation
2021–24 CSIRO Executive Manager, Company Creation
2019–21 CSIRO Missions Insights Lead, Chief of Staff & Strategy
2013–15 Cybercon Technology Operations Director — full P&L, China market

Judge & evaluator

The Hive Award 2024 — Food & Beverage UN World Food Forum 2023 — Global Agtech Extreme Tech Challenge 2022 — Global Agtech Hult Prize 2021 & 2022 — APAC Regional
